name: Chocolate Lover's Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour two heart-shaped or 9-inch round baking pans.
2. In a small saucepan, melt 1/4 cup butter. Remove from heat; stir in cocoa.
3. In a large bowl, beat 2/3 cup butter and 1 cup sugar until creamy. Add chocolate mixture, egg yolks, vanilla, and almond extracts; beat until blended. Gradually add flour, salt, and milk; beat until well combined. Stir in almonds.
4. In a medium bowl, beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add the remaining 3 tablespoons sugar, beating just until soft peaks form. Gently fold into chocolate mixture.
5. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans. Bake 20 to 25 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool for 10 minutes (the cake will settle slightly); remove from pans and transfer to wire racks. Cool completely.
6. Prepare GLAZE:
- In a small saucepan, combine 1/4 cup water and 3 tablespoons sugar. Heat to boiling, stirring until sugar is dissolved. Remove from heat; stir in 1 cup Hershey's Mini Chips Semi-Sweet Chocolate and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract. Beat with a whisk or spoon until chips are melted.
- Use immediately. Place one cake layer on a serving plate; drizzle half of the glaze over the layer. Top with the second layer. Spread the remaining glaze over the top and sides. Cool until set before garnishing as desired.
12 servings
